_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Analyze and report organizational security posture trends.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to assess organizational compliance posture across multiple jurisdictions simultaneously, identifying coverage gaps, requirement conflicts, and opportunities for harmonized compliance approaches.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-006 (SP, cosine: 0.494), LS-T-001 (LS, cosine: 0.421).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.519). Shared vocabulary: [organizational, posture]. DCWF-only terms [analyze, report, security, trends] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, across, approaches, assess, compliance, conflicts] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.891, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.036 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:61.4%, C:38.6%). No dominant classification for "Analyze and report organizational security posture trends." vs "Ability to assess organizational compliance posture across multiple jurisdiction" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.500 ≈ STS 0.519 (gap 0.019). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [organizational, posture] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [organizational, posture]. DCWF-only: [analyze, report, security, trends]. WIDAI-only: [ability, across, approaches, assess, compliance, conflicts].
